articles.title: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
articles.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

articles.summary: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.

articles.summary: Omar Artan vows to officiate at the 2030 tournament instead, following his ban from entering the US.
